case_title: LOANNOW LLC VS. JANA TRANTOW ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-14-2017 CONTINUED TO APR-17-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-14-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
